data.description: Summary of civil service reform implementation progress within DFID

data.description: Updated progress report on the recommendations made in the Civil Service Reform Plan.

data.title: 2010 to 2015 government policy: civil service reform
data.description: We're reforming the civil service to make sure it is capable of meeting any challenge.

data.description: A short summary of implementation progress within our department.

data.title: Declaration on Government Reform
data.description: The Declaration on Government Reform outlines how the Civil Service and Ministers will reform government together to deliver better for citizens.

data.title: Review of cross-government horizon scanning
data.description: In the Civil Service Reform Plan, the government committed to a cross-government review of horizon scanning capability.

data.title: Civil service compensation scheme
data.description: The government has moved a step closer to achieving its ambition of implementing a reformed civil service compensation scheme (CSCS).

data.title: Civil Service Diversity and Inclusion Strategy: 2022 to 2025
data.description: This strategy sets a new standard for diversity and inclusion, championing a diversity of backgrounds and opinions to better promote fairness and performance.

data.title: Cabinet Office Records Selection Policy
data.description: This document gives the Cabinet Office's approach to the selection of records for permanent preservation in line with the Public Records Act 1958.

data.title: Neighbourhood health framework
data.description: How ICBs, local authorities, health and wellbeing boards and other partners should create and deliver neighbourhood health services.

data.title: Civil Service Apprenticeships Strategy, 2022 to 2025
data.description: How the Civil Service will provide good quality entry and progression pathways for apprentices over the next 3 years.

data.title: Renters' Rights Act 2025: Implementation roadmap
data.description: The roadmap explains how the government will implement the Renters' Rights Act 2025 and reform the private rented sector.

data.title: Reforming the spending control and accountability framework
data.description: A report on the government’s plans to reform the public spending control and accountability framework
